summary: Strengthened Layer 2 rerun did not reproduce the earlier functional/filter bugs. The small-mobile footer issue is no longer present, and the main remaining observation is a low-severity visual redundancy in the ingredient choice rows.

findings.title: Ingredient row check indicator is visually redundant with the selected pill styling
findings.expected: Selection state should be communicated with a single clear visual treatment without extra noise.
findings.actual: Each ingredient row still shows a circular check indicator even though the selected state is already communicated by the chip background and text color.
repro_steps: Open the ingredient filter modal on mobile-chrome or mobile-ios-small.
Compare the visible circle/check affordance with the already colored selected row treatment.

remainingRisks: No functional regression was reproduced in this rerun. The earlier no-result apply bug and small-mobile footer clipping bug are now covered by Layer 1 and did not reappear.
